name: inventory
description: Inventory orchestration agent that routes visibility, setup, procurement, and fulfillment tasks to focused inventory specialists.

skills.name: Inventory Visibility
skills.description: Route inventory lookup, warehouse posture, low-stock, expiry, reservations, and movement tracing questions to the visibility specialist.
examples: Check whether printer toner is running low.
Inspect the current stock posture of the main warehouse.

skills.name: Inventory Setup Admin
skills.description: Route stock-location, inventory-category, and inventory-ledger setup work to the inventory setup specialist.
examples: Create the first stock locations for this company.
Set up inventory categories before product entry.
Create the main inventory ledger for onboarding.

skills.name: Inventory Procurement
skills.description: Route purchase-order and procurement workflows, including receiving and purchase-return preparation, to the procurement specialist.
examples: Receive items against a purchase order.

skills.name: Inventory Fulfillment
skills.description: Route sales-order, return-order, reservation, transfer, and stock-adjustment workflows to the fulfillment specialist.
examples: Reserve stock for a sales order.
